Backyard Treehouse Gets So Much Attention On Airbnb, Owner Doesn't Have To Work Anymore: 'I'm Booked For Months'
data.description: Will Sutherland built a treehouse in his backyard in six months' time. It's super popular on Airbnb Inc (NASDAQ: ABNB), bringing in an average of $30,000 per year on the platform.
